series_metadata.series_description: Recordings of in-bound and out-bound calls for quality assurance, security assessment, or for a Collections-related matter(s). [Any call needed for investigation, litigation, or for a Collections-related matter(s) will be copied from the system and retained according to the appropriate retention schedule for the investigation or case to which it pertains.]

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Records automatically deleted 90 days based on third-party service''s recording systems. [Any call needed investigation, litigation, or a Collections-related matter(s) will be copied from system and retained according appropriate retention schedule investigation or case which it pertains.]
